kept.text:
UBS Downgrades $MELI to Neutral from Buy, Lowers PT to $2,050 from $2,700

Analyst comments: "There is broad agreement that MELI is building a powerful infrastructure in LatAm, but since it announced the lower free-shipping threshold, questions about if, when, and how this investment cycle can be translated into profitability have arisen. We believe margins should remain under pressure and only start to recover from 2027-28 onward, based on our analysis of MELI’s past build-out phases and considering that the company remains in the early stages of this cycle, driven by the expansion in credit cards, CBT, and still-intense competition. We incorporate these trends into our numbers, reducing earnings estimates by approximately 9%, on average, over 2026-30E. Looking ahead, we see limited room for upward revisions given the competitive landscape and the ongoing investment cycle. Additionally, trading at 39x/27x P/E on 2026/27E, below historical levels, it seems fairly valued when adjusted for long-term growth versus peers, which, in our view, limits re-rating potential at this point."

Analyst: Kaio Prato

profile_bio.description: Fast, accurate, consistent stock market news, earnings highlights & more. By Brillinsight. Not financial advice.

kept.text:
What they should have wrote is the price of the stock went down so they are downgrading $MELI

The free shipping threshold in Brazil has been in place for 10 months now. Margins may come in slightly lower as they scale 1P groceries and full china but revenues will also likely come in higher than expected.

I am not convinced these analysts really understand the story.

profile_bio.description: Long-term value in high conviction holdings. All thoughts are my own. NFA

kept.text:
📊 MercadoLibre Inc $MELI evalúa vender parte de su cartera de préstamos para fortalecer su negocio fintech (Mercado Pago), en respuesta al rápido crecimiento del crédito y la necesidad de financiación para escalar

💳 La compañía mantiene su estrategia: no planea vender negocios clave y continúa impulsando IA para mejorar decisiones crediticias, mientras gestiona mayores costes en logística y expansión

🌎 Sobre Venezuela, la empresa señala que su presencia sigue siendo limitada y sin cambios, con foco principal en Brasil y México

⚔️ En paralelo, enfrenta mayor competencia de https://t.co/nHuls4FKwC Inc $AMZN y otros players globales, aunque mantiene inversiones para crecer en Latinoamérica 💡 #MercadoLibre #Fintech #LatAm
